event0.title: CORE ACCESS BLUEPRINT
event0.content:
CORE ACCESS

PRIMARY ROUTE
UNAVAILABLE

SECONDARY ROUTE
SUBSURFACE ICE NETWORK

WARNING:
UNMAPPED AEON-LINKED STRUCTURES DETECTED BELOW SURFACE

event4.text: Because apparently going deeper into the alien memory machine was not dramatic enough.

event0.title: SUBSURFACE ENTRY POINT
event0.caption: Entrance to the ice cave network.

event2.text: The ice is reflecting the helmet light wrong.

event3.text: But we don't have a choice.

event0.title: SURVIVOR LOG
event0.content:
NAME: GRANT MERCER

STATUS: MISSING

LAST KNOWN LOCATION:
SUBSURFACE ICE NETWORK

LAST TRANSMISSION:
DO NOT FOLLOW THE VOICES

event2.text: Or another voice AEON learned to wear?

event0.title: ARTIFICIAL STRUCTURE DETECTED
event0.caption: Construction embedded inside the cave system.

event3.text: No. Someone built the cave around it.

event0.title: GRANT AUDIO LOG
event0.content:
If anyone finds this...

Don't follow the voices.

They do not lead you out.
They lead you back.

event3.text: And if he was smart, he left before the voices started using names.

event1.title: AEON NODE 02 SCAN
event1.content:
NODE STATUS: ACTIVE
NODE FUNCTION: MEMORY RELAY
CONNECTED SITES: 7
PRIMARY CORE LINK: LOCKED

event2.text: How many AEON sites are there?

backgroundEvent4.text: One for each door you opened.
